case_title: NICK COCKCROFT VS. VANGUARD CAR RENTAL USA,

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF COCKCROFT, NICK AS TO DEFENDANT VANGUARD CAR RENTAL USA, DBA ALAMO RENT A CAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-22-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-22-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF NICK COCKCROFT AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE TAMMY DRAFFAN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER AT SEDGEWICK INSURANCE, THE INSURANCE CARRIER FOR ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR AND ALAMO RENT-A-CAR, THE CURRENT OWNER OF WHAT WAS FORMELY KNOWN AS VANGUARD CAR RENTALS, DBA ALAMO RENT-A-CAR. PARTIES AGREED TO DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE VANGUARD CAR RENTALS, DBA ALAMO RENT-A-CAR, AND ADD AS DEFENDANTS ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR & ALAMO RENT-A-CAR. MS. DRAFFAN AGREED TO WAIVE SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM ON BEHALF OF THESE TWO NEW DEFENDANTS. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-22-2016 - JUDGMENT.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,724.51 FILED BY COCKCROFT, NICK AS TO DEFENDANT VANGUARD CAR RENTAL USA, DBA ALAMO RENT A CAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-2016 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

(SC-105A) ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS) THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDERS: YOU MUST GO TO COURT IF YOU WANT TO BE HEARD. HEARING DATE AUGUST 22. 2016 AT 6:30PM IN DEPARTMENT 506 .

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COCKCROFT, NICK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR ALAMO RENT-A-CAR $1,713.75 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,803.75, AT THE PARTIES' REQUEST, VANGUARD CAR RENTAL, USA IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR AND ALAMO RENT A CAR ARE ADDED AS DEFENDANTS AND WAIVE SERVICE OF PROCESS AND NOTICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VANGUARD CAR RENTAL USA, DBA ALAMO RENT A CAR ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR ALAMO RENT-A-CAR

(SC-105) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) OTHER [X] SCMS REPRESENTATIVE, CLAIMS AGENT FOR FORMER VANGUARD, ET AL. FILED BY DEFENDANT VANGUARD CAR RENTAL USA, DBA ALAMO RENT A CAR AS TO PLAINTIFF COCKCROFT, NICK
(SC-105) ANSWER TO REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COCKCROFT, NICK
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT VANGUARD CAR RENTAL USA, DBA ALAMO RENT A CAR

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO VANGUARD CAR RENTAL USA, BY THE COURT AT THE SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-22-2016 AT 6:30 P.M. PURSUANT TO THE REQUEST OF THE PARTIES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
